title: Wholesale used motor vehicle stock
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Wholesale used motor vehicle stock demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Canvass dealerships regarding requirements for used motor vehicles

pcs.text: Retail buyers are consulted to obtain data about their requirements for used motor vehicles1.2 Data from retail buyers is collected, collated and documented1.3 Collected data is analysed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Retail buyers are consulted to obtain data about their requirements for used motor vehicles1.2 Data from retail buyers is collected, collated and documented1.3 Collected data is analysed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Retail buyers are consulted to obtain data about their requirements for used motor vehicles1.2 Data from retail buyers is collected, collated and documented1.3 Collected data is analysed.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Canvass dealerships regarding requirements for used motor vehicles

elements.title: Check workplace records to determine stock surpluses and wholesaling options

pcs.text: Workplace records and databases relating to used motor vehicle stock are accessed and information relating to surplus stock is retrieved2.2 Data from workplace records and databases is collated, analysed and documented2.3 Analysed workplace data is compared with established retail buyer requirements within commercially realistic timeframe2.4 Potential surplus used motor vehicle stock to wholesale is identified based on market demand
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Workplace records and databases relating to used motor vehicle stock are accessed and information relating to surplus stock is retrieved2.2 Data from workplace records and databases is collated, analysed and documented2.3 Analysed workplace data is compared with established retail buyer requirements within commercially realistic timeframe2.4 Potential surplus used motor vehicle stock to wholesale is identified based on market demand?

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Check workplace records to determine stock surpluses and wholesaling options

elements.title: Wholesale used motor vehicle stock

pcs.text: Potential buyers of surplus used vehicle stock are identified from existing networks and available databases3.2 Satisfactory selling or purchase price is negotiated with potential buyers3.3 Surplus stock is sold to buyers in compliance with legislative and statutory requirements3.4 Workplace records are updated to reflect sale and current holding of used motor vehicle stock
